I will read `Parser.java` to see how to integrate the context-sensitive checking.

I will implement `CheckVisitor` and `AnyDuplicatesVisitor` in `Syntax.java` to perform context-sensitive checking.

blocks.text: I will re-examine `Interp.java` to clarify the `NeedBinding` implementation and its `setBinding` methods.
I will read lines 116 to 140 of `Interp.java`.

I will now implement the `JamLazyNameCons` and `JamLazyNeedCons` classes, the `ConsPolicy`es, and the `forLet` method in `Interp.java`. I will also add the `jamEquals` method to `EvalVisitor` and update `BinOpEvaluator` to use it.

input.instruction: Implement lazy cons, recursive let, and short-circuit equality in Interp.java.

blocks.text: I will now implement the `forLet` and `jamEquals` methods in the `EvalVisitor` class and update the `BinOpEvaluator` class in `Interp.java`.

blocks.text: I will now update the `forOpEquals` and `forOpNotEquals` methods in the `BinOpEvaluator` class in `Interp.java` to use the `jamEquals` method for short-circuit equality.
